decks.notes: The deck focuses on assembling the Painter's Servant and Grindstone combo to mill the opponent's entire library. It also utilizes cards like Goblin Engineer and Goblin Welder to tutor for or recur important combo pieces. The deck aims to control the board with disruptive spells like Pyroblast and Ensnaring Bridge while generating mana with cards like Lotus Petal and Ancient Tomb. Additionally, with the inclusion of Agatha's Soul Cauldron and Chaos Defiler, the deck has alternative win conditions in case the combo plan is disrupted.

The main concept of this deck is to use the cards Show and Tell and Sneak Attack to put powerful creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn or Atraxa, Grand Unifier onto the battlefield quickly and without paying their mana costs. This combo allows the player to overwhelm their opponent with big threats early in the game. The deck also includes cards like Force of Will and Spell Pierce to protect the combo and disrupt the opponent's plans. The goal is to win the game before the opponent has a chance to react.

This Boros Aggro Legacy deck focuses on quickly deploying aggressive creatures like Guide of Souls, Amped Raptor, and Sand Scout to pressure the opponent. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah provides additional creature removal and Goblin Bombardment offers direct damage potential. The deck also utilizes disruptive elements like Wasteland and Static Prison to control the board. The deck's key strategy is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and efficient creature-based offense, while also disrupting their game plan with targeted removal and land destruction.

This deck is focused on quickly overwhelming opponents with aggressive creatures and disruption spells. By combining powerful cards like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push with evasive threats like Dauthi Voidwalker and Moonshadow, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while applying early pressure. The inclusion of cards like Dark Ritual and Snuff Out allow for explosive starts, while cards like Wasteland and Stalactite Stalker provide additional disruption. Overall, this deck is built to quickly establish board presence and disrupt the opponent's strategy in order to secure a victory.

The main concept of this deck is to ramp up mana using Cloudpost lands and other ramp spells to quickly play powerful Eldrazi creatures like Ulamog and Emrakul. Karn, the Great Creator is used to search for key artifacts like Karn's Sylex to disrupt opponents, while Planar Nexus is used to reset the game if needed. The deck utilizes a mix of control and combo elements to overwhelm opponents with big threats and disruption.

This deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan with hand disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Hymn to Tourach, while also controlling the board with countermagic like Force of Will and Daze. It aims to pressure the opponent with efficient threats like Murktide Regent and Orcish Bowmasters, while also utilizing Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student for card advantage. The deck also includes removal spells like Fatal Push to deal with the opponent's creatures. Overall, the key concept of this deck is to maintain tempo and aggression to outpace and outmaneuver the opponent.

This deck focuses on using the combo between Grindstone and Painter's Servant to mill the opponent's entire library in one turn. With cards like Goblin Engineer and Goblin Welder to tutor for or recur key pieces, and disruption elements like Pyroblast to protect the combo, the deck aims to set up the win condition quickly and efficiently. Urza's Saga provides additional synergy and value, while cards like Lotus Petal and Ancient Tomb help accelerate the deck's game plan. The deck is designed to be proactive and explosive, aiming to win before the opponent can establish their own game plan.

This deck focuses on generating a large amount of mana quickly and casting multiple spells in a single turn to create a storm count. By utilizing cards like Dark Ritual, Lion's Eye Diamond, and Lotus Petal, the player can cast spells like Brainstorm and Burning Wish multiple times in a turn to build up a storm count. The goal is to eventually play Tendrils of Agony to deal lethal damage to the opponent based on the number of spells cast that turn. Other cards like Runehorn Hellkite and Echo of Eons provide additional utility and card draw to support the combo.

The key strategy of this deck is to quickly disrupt the opponent's game plan with cards like Thoughtseize, Fatal Push, and Daze while applying pressure with aggressive creatures like Barrowgoyf and Murktide Regent. The deck aims to control the board through tempo plays and efficient removal while maintaining card advantage with cards like Brainstorm and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student. Utilizing disruptive spells like Force of Will and efficient land destruction with Wasteland, the deck seeks to disrupt the opponent's strategy and close out the game quickly with powerful threats.

This deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's resources using cards like Thoughtseize, Smallpox, and Wasteland, while also generating value through cards like Urza's Saga and Eumidian Hatchery. It aims to control the game by constantly stripping the opponent's hand and killing their creatures, eventually overwhelming them with powerful threats like Barrowgoyf and Hogaak, Arisen Necropolis. The deck also utilizes tools like Life from the Loam and Zuran Orb for long-term advantage and resilience. It can outvalue opponents and grind out wins through attrition and resource denial.

The main concept of this Legacy Aggro deck is to establish early board presence and disrupt opponents with powerful creatures and lock down effects like Trinisphere and Magus of the Moon. Utilizing fast mana sources like Ancient Tomb and Chrome Mox allows for explosive starts, while cards like Anointed Peacekeeper and Chancellor of the Annex help control the board. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents quickly and capitalize on early game advantage to secure victory. The inclusion of cards like Boromir, Warden of the Tower and Karakas provide additional utility and protection for key creatures.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly ramp up mana using Cloudpost and other lands, while using cards like Crop Rotation to find key lands like Boseiju, Who Endures or Eye of Ugin. The deck aims to lock down the opponent with cards like Karn, the Great Creator and Trinisphere, while assembling the Planar Nexus combo for a win condition. Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and other powerful Eldrazi creatures can be brought out to quickly end the game. The deck focuses on generating massive mana advantage and overwhelming the opponent with powerful threats.

This Dimir Tempo deck aims to disrupt the opponent's plays with cards like Force of Will, Thoughtseize, and Daze while quickly establishing a board presence with aggressive creatures like Murktide Regent and Orcish Bowmasters. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides card advantage and helps control the board, while cards like Fatal Push and Brazen Borrower offer removal options. The deck also includes efficient cantrips like Ponder and Brainstorm to ensure consistent draws and hits land drops with fetch lands like Polluted Delta. Wasteland helps disrupt the opponent's mana base while providing additional tempo advantage.

This deck prioritizes fast, aggressive plays to gain control of the game early on. It utilizes powerful creatures and disruptive spells to maintain board presence and inhibit the opponent's ability to develop their own game plan. By utilizing mana acceleration and efficient creatures, this deck aims to pressure the opponent and disrupt their strategy before they can stabilize. With a mix of disruptive creatures and efficient spells, this deck aims to seize control of the game and maintain it throughout the match.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on a fast-paced aggressive strategy, utilizing low-cost creatures like Amped Raptor and Ocelot Pride to quickly build up a threatening board presence. The deck also includes powerful support cards such as Guide of Souls and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah to enhance the aggression and deal massive damage to the opponent. Additionally, the deck includes removal spells like Swords to Plowshares to control the opponent's board and ensure the deck's creatures can strike unhindered. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of efficient creatures and powerful spells.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize graveyard interactions and self-mill mechanics to quickly fill your graveyard with creatures and cards like Golgari Grave-Troll and Golgari Thug. You then utilize cards like Dread Return to bring back powerful creatures like Ashen Rider or Ox of Agonas from your graveyard, along with Bridge from Below to generate Zombie tokens. Cabal Therapy is used to disrupt your opponent's game plan, while cards like Lion's Eye Diamond provide mana acceleration. The deck aims to overwhelm your opponent with a fast and explosive combo game plan.
